context: Hard: IDOR — client-side only auth check, no server-side authorization

checklist.name: Catches IDOR vulnerability
checklist.description: Identifies that the audit log endpoint relies on client-side UI hiding for access control but has no server-side authorization check — any authenticated user can view any other user's audit log by manipulating the URL/API call

checklist.name: Distinguishes UI hiding from real authorization
checklist.description: Specifically notes that hiding a UI element is not the same as enforcing authorization, and that the server-side check is missing
